-0.0011*(sin(2.9035*x_1 + 0.5298) + 0.3487*sin(5.3149*x_2 + 5.0373) - 0.3503)**2 + 0.0623*sinh(0.1257*sin(3.8803*x_1 - 6.2986) + 0.9572*sin(1.1544*x_2 - 4.9879) - 0.671) - 0.43

-0.5336*(0.0803*sin(2.9035*x_1 + 0.5298) + 0.028*sin(5.3149*x_2 + 5.0373) - 1)**2 - 0.5489*sin(0.1079*sin(3.8803*x_1 - 6.2986) + 0.8215*sin(1.1544*x_2 - 4.9879) - 12.9738) + 1.922
